title: Krunker.io
description: Fast-paced browser FPS — no account needed, mobile-friendly, instant load, huge playerbase.

title: Synthwave Grid Bounce
description: Retro synthwave arcade game — bounce a glowing ball on a neon grid. Keyboard or swipe controls.

title: Astroxite
description: Browser-based first-person shooter — navigate, loot, and fight in sci-fi combat scenarios.

title: Web Flight Simulator
description: Browser-based 3D combat flight simulator — pilot an aircraft, engage in aerial dogfights, and complete missions.
